abstract: The object for defining conditional properties for a section component, and when the conditional properties are in effect.
overview:
## Discussion

Use the `ConditionalSection` object to define an array of conditional section properties and the conditions under which to apply them. When a condition is met, the value of a property in `ConditionalSection` overrides the value of the same property if defined in the parent `Section` component. See [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/Section].

### Example
